title_cn: 据称 AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 的 IPO 目标金额高达 40 亿美元
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. is seeking to raise as much as $4 billion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand for the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center operator’s shares heats up.

title: Bloomberg House Miami Highlights F1 Grand Prix
title_cn: 迈阿密彭博之家聚焦 F1 大奖赛
summary:
Formula One racing returns to Miami this weekend, with the fourth leg in the world championship speeding through south Florida. Bloomberg Hot Pursuit Co-hosts Matt Miller and Hannah Elliott join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss all things F1.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India-Linked Ship Carrying Cooking Fuel Manages Hormuz Exit
title_cn: 与印度有关的运输烹饪燃料的船舶管理霍尔木兹出口
summary: An India-linked tanker laden with liquefied petroleum gas has managed to transit the Strait of Hormuz, a rare crossing that underscores the country’s struggle to alleviate an historic energy crisis.

title: Beijing Tells Chinese Firms to Ignore US Sanctions on Refiners
title_cn: 北京要求中国企业无视美国对炼油商的制裁
summary: China ordered companies in the country not to comply with US sanctions on five domestic refiners linked to the Iranian oil trade, in a defiant move aimed at softening the impact of penalties.

title: Hungary Warns of Drought Hit to Agriculture From April Dry Spell
title_cn: 匈牙利警告四月干旱将给农业带来干旱
summary: Hungary’s incoming government said it plans to take emergency steps to help farmers as a dry spell during much of April is leading to a severe drought in the grain-producing country.

title: Berkshire Hathaway Posts $11.35 Billion Earning
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司公布盈利 113.5 亿美元
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc.’s cash pile jumped to its highest level ever, reaching $397 billion, inGreg Abel’s first quarter as chief executive officer. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Analyst Matthew Palazola joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Berkshire Hathaway’s Cash Pile Surges to Record $397 Billion
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司现金储备激增至创纪录的 3970 亿美元
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc.’s cash pile jumped to its highest level ever, reaching $397 billion, in Greg Abel’s first quarter as chief executive officer.

title: Iran Juggles Oil Cuts and Storage Strain to Resist US Blockade
title_cn: 伊朗通过减产和储存紧张来应对美国的封锁
summary: As the US naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz tightens around Iran’s oil trade, exports have plunged in recent weeks and storage is rapidly filling. Already, the country has begun curbing production, according to a senior Iranian official.

title: Adam ‘Not Satoshi’ Back Is at Peace With Wall Street Crypto Era
title_cn: 亚当“不是中本聪”回归，与华尔街加密时代和平相处
summary: Adam Back has spent weeks being asked yet again, in various forums and by various people, whether he is the inventor of Bitcoin.

title: Spirit Airlines Shuts Operations After White House Bailout Collapse
title_cn: 白宫救助失败后精神航空关闭运营
summary: Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc.is winding down operations after the troubled US discount carrier buckled under the weight of surging fuel prices and a government bailout dangled by US President Donald Trump fell through. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Aerospace, Defense, and Airlines Analyst George Ferguson and Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Kevin Warsh Means for the Future of the Fed
title_cn: 凯文·沃什对美联储的未来意味着什么
summary: The Federal Reserve held its latest policy meeting this week with inflation still elevated, the war in Iran still rattling energy markets, and a new Chair waiting to be confirmed by the Senate. Former economic adviser to President Bush and Columbia Business School dean Glenn Hubbard breaks down what the Fed's decision signals about the economy and what Kevin Warsh's incoming leadership could mean for the institution's purpose, strategy, and independence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Rules for India Shadow Banks May Put Tata Sons IPO on Radar
title_cn: 印度影子银行新规可能会让塔塔之子 IPO 受到关注
summary: A tweak by India’s central bank to the definition of shadow lenders has potentially revived the debate about whether Tata Sons Pvt. — the controller of one of the country’s largest conglomerates — could be forced to list in the near future.

title: Reinvention at the Fed and in Las Vegas
title_cn: 美联储和拉斯维加斯的重塑
summary: The FOMC held its meeting this week.

title: Oil Tanker Pricing Feud Embroils a Centuries-Old London Market
title_cn: 油轮定价之争卷入了具有数百年历史的伦敦市场
summary: A legal claim from one of the world’s largest oil traders is throwing a spotlight on an arcane but critical corner of global finance — the multibillion-dollar freight market and the 282-year-old City of London institution that sits at the heart of it.

title: OPEC+ Agrees in Principle on Small Output Hike, Reuters Reports
title_cn: 路透社报道，OPEC+原则上同意小幅增产
summary: Seven members of OPEC+ have reached an agreement in principle to raise oil output targets by around 188,000 barrels per day in June, Reuters reported Saturday, citing unnamed sources.

title: World’s Largest Container Carrier Plans Route Avoiding Hormuz
title_cn: 全球最大集装箱运输公司计划避开霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The world’s largest container carrier plans a new service linking Europe with isolated Middle East ports, using trucking across Saudi Arabia and smaller vessels in the Persian Gulf instead of transiting the blocked Strait of Hormuz.

title: Finland Must Continue to Consolidate Public Finances, Rehn Says
title_cn: 雷恩表示芬兰必须继续巩固公共财政
summary: Finland can no longer avoid or delay dealing with its growing public debt, Bank of Finland Governor Olli Rehn said.

title: India's Woes Bigger Than Any One Political Figure, Amitav Ghosh Says
title_cn: 阿米塔夫·戈什表示，印度的困境比任何一位政治人物都严重
summary: "The problem for India goes beyond any one political figure." Amitav Ghosh tells Mishal Husain that India is struggling to find its role in the world amid continental competition from China, Russia and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Why fossils are selling for millions to wealthy collectors.

title: Odd Lots: Inside a Booming Market for Dinosaur Fossils (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的地块：恐龙化石蓬勃发展的市场内部（播客）
summary: Two years ago, Citadel’s Ken Griffin paid almost $45 million or a stegosaurus skeleton, making it the most expensive fossil ever sold at auction. So why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires instead of museums? How does the private market for fossils actually work? And how similar is it to the market for art and other antiquities? In this episode, we speak with Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron, where he is the gallery’s in-house broker for dinosa

title: LA’s Television City Studio Lot Faces Sale Forced by Lenders
title_cn: 洛杉矶电视城工作室地块面临贷款人强制出售
summary: Lenders are forcing Hollywood landlord Hackman Capital Partners, the largest independent studio and soundstage owner, to relinquish entertainment properties around Los Angeles as values plunge and demand stays soft.

title: Building 'The World's Alternative Investment Marketplace': Masters in Business
title_cn: 建立“世界另类投资市场”：商业硕士
summary: Barry speaks with Lawrence Calcano, chairman and CEO of iCapital about how he helped build the company into one of the globe's leading platforms for alternative investments for wealth managers, advisors, bankers and other financial professionals.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Week | Warsh’s Fed, Vibe Coding, Geothermal Energy, Vegas Bets Big
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | Warsh’s Fed、Vibe Coding、地热能源、维加斯押注巨大
summary: This week, The Fed made its call this week, but Kevin Warsh may be about to change the institution itself. And, AI made coding easy for everyone, and that's the best and worst thing to happen to software engineering. Plus, can the same technology that unlocked oil and gas now unlock clean energy? Later, the city that was built by the mob is now betting its future on dayclubs, nightlife, and premium experiences. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Columbia Risks Losing Top Credit Rating as Trump Slams Colleges
title_cn: 特朗普猛烈抨击大学，哥伦比亚面临失去最高信用评级的风险
summary: Columbia University’s credit outlook was revised to negative by Moody’s Ratings, which cited rising risks tied to the “federal environment for higher education.”

title: Gold Notches Second Weekly Loss as US-Iran Talks Hang in Limbo
title_cn: 由于美伊谈判悬而未决，金价连续第二周下跌
summary: Gold steadied as traders digested the latest developments in the standoff between the US and Iran that’s heightened inflation risks and dashed hopes for rate cuts from central banks across the world.

title: Lancôme Global Brand President on Tapping into Longevity
title_cn: 兰蔻全球品牌总裁谈进军长寿
summary: Lancôme Global Brand President Vania Lacascade discusses why longevity will be the next shift for the beauty industry, and how brands are tapping into the wellness boom. She talks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Archroma Reaches Final Terms on Much Delayed Loan Extension
title_cn: 昂高就拖延已久的贷款延期达成最终条款
summary: Specialty chemicals producer Archroma sweetened the terms on a junk loan deal to extend around $1 billion of debt, inching closer to completing a transaction that has faced multiple delays over the past month.

title: Pershing Square IPO Investors Post Gain After Free Shares
title_cn: 潘兴广场 IPO 投资者在免费股票后获利
summary: Investors in Bill Ackman’s new $5 billion closed-end fund ended the week with a small gain overall, once the value of the free shares they received in his asset management company is included.

title: Why Vibe Coding Isn’t the End of the Software Engineer
title_cn: 为什么 Vibe 编码不是软件工程师的终结
summary: Generative AI has turned coding from a specialized skill into something anyone can do with a simple prompt. A warehouse owner is revolutionizing his shipping software with AI and a creative designer vibe coded  her first app with zero technical experience. Computer programmers are doing it too, but a director at Google Cloud AI says vibe coding does not mean the end of serious engineering. As professionals and hobbyists alike are writing code with AI, hiring for junior developers is falling fast and researchers warn companies are making a dangerous short-term bet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside the Booming Market for Dinosaur Fossils | Odd Lots
title_cn: 恐龙化石蓬勃发展的市场内部零股
summary: Two years ago, Citadel's Ken Griffin paid almost $45 million for a stegosaurus skeleton, making it the most expensive fossil ever sold at auction. So why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires instead of museums? How does the private market for fossils actually work? And how similar is it to the market for art and other antiquities? In this episode, we speak with Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron, where he is the gallery's in-house broker for dinosaur fossils. We talk about how fossils are found and priced, what it's like to work alongside dinosaur hunters, how his gallery identifies potential buyers, and why Joe thinks something about the birds-to-dinosaurs evolutionary pipeline is off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Court Rules Firms Can’t Lay Off Workers on AI Grounds
title_cn: 中国法院裁定企业不得以人工智能为由解雇员工
summary: A Chinese court ruled that companies cannot terminate employees just to replace them with artificial intelligence systems, as authorities juggle the need to stabilize the domestic labor market with a global race to develop AI technologies.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Hand Pentagon More Control Over AI Systems
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊让五角大楼对人工智能系统有更多控制权
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: ‘Golden’ or ‘Garbage’: Milken Signals New Private Credit Era
title_cn: “黄金”还是“垃圾”：米尔肯标志着新的私人信贷时代
summary: Months before Jamie Dimon’s infamous remark about more than one “cockroach” lurking in credit markets, TCW Group Inc. Chief Executive Officer Katie Koch warned the direct lending industry was due for a reckoning.

title: Musk’s Trial Against OpenAI Hits Some Rough Spots in First Week
title_cn: 马斯克针对 OpenAI 的审判第一周就遇到了一些困难
summary: Elon Musk set out to tell a jury that his falling out with OpenAI was a simple tale of betrayal.

title: EBay Soars on Report GameStop Is Preparing Takeover Bid
title_cn: 据报道 GameStop 正在准备收购要约，eBay 股价飙升
summary: EBay Inc. jumped more than 15% in after-hours trading on Friday after the Wall Street Journal reported that video-game retailer GameStop Corp. is preparing a bid for the company.

title: Apple Raises Mac Mini’s Starting Price to $799 After AI Frenzy Drains Supply
title_cn: AI 狂热耗尽供应后，苹果将 Mac Mini 的起价提高至 799 美元
summary: Apple Inc. raised the starting price of its Mac mini desktop to $799 from $599, adjusting to inventory shortages driven by AI demand and the tight supply of processors.

title: Fmr. BET CEO Debra Lee on Media Landscape, Handbag Line
title_cn: 先生。 BET 首席执行官 Debra Lee 谈媒体格局、手袋系列
summary: Former BET Chair & CEO Debra Lee discusses the changing media landscape, why good content will always find its audience, and her new luxury handbag line. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says Too Soon to Buy
title_cn: 看到抛售即将到来的 Shopify 分析师表示，现在买入还为时过早
summary: The analyst who slapped the only sell rating on Shopify Inc. over valuation concerns ahead of its blistering rout said it’s still too soon to jump back in.

title: Disney’s New CEO Is Exploring a ‘Super App’ For Theme Park Tickets, Movies and More
title_cn: 迪士尼新任首席执行官正在探索主题公园门票、电影等的“超级应用程序”
summary: Walt Disney Co. senior executives are discussing how to unify the company’s disparate mobile apps and turn its streaming service into the first stop for all things Disney, a place where users can book park tickets, buy merchandise, play games and watch movies, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Stocks Close at New Record High Capping Solid Earnings Week
title_cn: 美国股市收盘创历史新高，为本周稳健的盈利奠定基础
summary: The S&P 500 Index extended a record-breaking streak Friday to mark a fifth week of gains after solid earnings from tech mega caps. Oil dropped amid hopes that the US and Iran were getting closer to a ceasefire agreement.

title: Nuclear AI Startup Fermi Promised Land and Ample Power. But It Couldn't Sign a Single Client
title_cn: 核人工智能初创公司费米承诺土地和充足的电力。但它无法签署单个客户
summary: Now the ex-CEO is waging a battle for Fermi’s future and its vision of atomic-powered data centers in the Texas panhandle.

title: OpenAI’s Revenue Chief Says Enterprise Business ‘Accelerating’
title_cn: OpenAI 收入主管表示企业业务“加速”
summary: A recent report raised concerns about OpenAI missing its growth targets.

title: The Online Games Where the House Always Wins
title_cn: 赌场总是获胜的在线游戏
summary: Online casino-style games like Monopoly GO! are huge. Could new scrutiny challenge how they do business?

title: Apple Forecasts Sales Growth Amid Memory Shortage | Bloomberg Tech 5/1/2026
title_cn: 苹果预测内存短缺导致销量增长彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Apple’s strong outlook amid the continued memory supply crunch. Plus, Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki discusses the gaming platform’s "aggressive push to enhance safety" that tempered user growth. And, Bloomberg spoke with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar who pushes back on a report that the AI leader is missing its own targets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Investor 'Choosiness' for AI Debt: Cisar
title_cn: Cisar：一些投资者对人工智能债务“挑剔”
summary: Winnie Cisar, global head of strategy at CreditSights, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO Turns to AI and Quantum Computing to Predict Earthquakes
title_cn: BMO 利用人工智能和量子计算来预测地震
summary: Bank of Montreal is betting on artificial intelligence and quantum computing to help predict earthquakes and respond to wildfires as part of the Canadian bank’s expansion in the US.

title: Roblox Shares Dive on Slower User Growth
title_cn: Roblox 股价因用户增长放缓而暴跌
summary: Roblox stock plummeted after the company slashed its full-year bookings forecast, admitting that new age-verification and child-safety features are creating major short-term friction for user growth. Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twilio CEO on Its ‘Milestone Quarter’
title_cn: Twilio 首席执行官谈其“里程碑季度”
summary: Twilio reported its fastest revenue growth in over three years, fueled by a massive surge in AI-driven demand. Twilio CEO Khozema Shipchandler discussed what he called a “milestone quarter” with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar says the company is meeting objectives and sees a “vertical wall of demand” for its products. Bloomberg's Shirin Ghaffary joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow to discuss those comments on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Hacker Pleads Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Attacks
title_cn: 俄罗斯黑客承认袭击石油和天然气设施
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries pleaded guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison.

title: BMO's Milchanowski on Quantum's Banking Sector Impact
title_cn: BMO 的 Milchanowski 谈量子对银行业的影响
summary: BMO Chief AI and Quantum Officer Kristin Milchanowski discusses how cutting edge AI and quantum tech will impact business, and the banking sector, for the foreseeable future. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Final Fantasy XIV’ Faces Key Test as Thousands of Fans Gather
title_cn: 数千粉丝齐聚，《最终幻想14》面临关键考验
summary: The longrunning online game has a lot of work to do to recover from the disappointing ‘Dawntrail’ expansion

title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Company to Help Build Humanoid Technology
title_cn: Meta 收购 Robotics AI 公司，帮助构建人形技术
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup developing artificial intelligence models for robots, as part of a major initiative to build humanoid technology.

title: Roblox to Challenge Unity, Unreal Engines With New AI Software
title_cn: Roblox 将利用新的 AI 软件挑战 Unity 和虚幻引擎
summary: Roblox Corp. is launching a new product that will position its popular video-game creation software to better compete with Unity Software Inc. and Epic Games, whose engines are used by most big-budget game-makers.

title: US Economy 'Incredibly Resilient': Mossavar-Rahmani
title_cn: 莫萨瓦尔-拉赫马尼：美国经济“极其有弹性”
summary: Sharmin Mossavar-Rahmani, wealth management CIO and head of the investment strategy group at Goldman Sachs, says the US economy has been "incredibly resilient" despite the impact of the Iran war. She joined "Bloomberg Surveillance" on April 30 to discuss how significant AI spending by Big Tech and restrictive monetary policies are shaping market dynamics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar pushed back on concerns about missing internal targets, saying the company is meeting objectives and sees “a vertical wall of demand” for its products.

title: Tether’s Gold Hoard Nears $20 Billion as Buying Continues
title_cn: 随着购买的继续，Tether 的黄金储备接近 200 亿美元
summary: Tether Holdings SA bought more than six tons of gold for its reserves in the first three months of the year, extending a buying streak that’s made it the largest known holder of bullion in the world outside of banks and nation states.

title: Trump’s Feud With New York Masks Amtrak’s Spending Spree
title_cn: 特朗普与纽约的不和掩盖了美铁的大笔支出
summary: Advancement of a project in Baltimore shows how the railway is navigating the president’s second term.

title: Zelenskiy, Slovak PM Fico Keep Dialogue Open Despite Energy Rift
title_cn: 尽管能源分歧，泽连斯基与斯洛伐克总理菲科仍保持对话
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy and Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico agreed to continue high-level contacts despite ongoing differences over Russian energy supplies.

title: Trump Says Prefers Not to Strike Iran Even as Frustration Mounts
title_cn: 特朗普表示，即使沮丧情绪加剧，也不愿打击伊朗
summary: US President Donald Trump expressed frustration with Iranian negotiations but stopped short of threatening to end the brittle ceasefire between the countries and order fresh airstrikes.

title: Taiwan’s Lai Arrives in Eswatini, Defying China-Backed Blockade
title_cn: 台湾赖清德抵达斯威士兰，无视中国支持的封锁
summary: Taiwan’s President Lai Ching-te arrived at Eswatini on Saturday after an earlier trip was derailed by several China-friendly African countries closing their airspace to his aircraft.

title: NATO Wants Details of US Plan to Pull 5,000 Troops From Germany
title_cn: 北约希望了解美国从德国撤军 5000 人的计划的细节
summary: The US has ordered the drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany over the next year, following through on President Donald Trump’s threats to reduce American military presence in the country as tensions escalate over the war with Iran.

title: Russian Tuapse Oil Terminal Fire Extinguished After Attack
title_cn: 俄罗斯图阿普谢石油码头遇袭后大火被扑灭
summary: The fire at a marine terminal in Russia’s Black Sea port of Tuapse has been extinguished following Friday’s Ukrainian drone strike, Krasnodar region emergency authorities said on Telegram.

title: German Minister Says Europe Must Take More Onus on Security: DPA
title_cn: 德国部长表示欧洲必须在安全方面承担更多责任：DPA
summary: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius said Europe must assume greater responsibility for security in the region, while emphasizing the continued importance of shared military interests with the US.

title: Japan’s Takaichi Lays Out Revamped Indo-Pacific Vision in Speech
title_cn: 日本高市在演讲中阐述了新的印太愿景
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi delivered a landmark speech to convey her vision for deepening her nation’s economic and security ties with the Indo-Pacific, with a view to making the region more resilient in the face of geopolitical challenges.

title: US Names Vietnam as ‘Priority’ Nation on IP Watch List
title_cn: 美国将越南列入知识产权观察名单“优先”国家
summary: The US Trade Representative identified Vietnam as a top concern in a new report on intellectual property rights, in a move that could prompt a fresh trade investigation into a leading trading partner.

title: Mexican Governor Steps Down Temporarily After US Indictment
title_cn: 墨西哥州长在美国起诉后暂时辞职
summary: The Mexican governor charged by the US over alleged drug-related crimes stepped down temporarily while investigations are underway.

title: Germany Is Preparing Supply Lines for a War, It’s Far From Ready
title_cn: 德国正在为战争准备补给线，但还远没有准备好
summary: In Bremerhaven on Germany’s North Sea coast, Europe’s largest car port is getting a €1.35 billion ($1.6 billion) upgrade. The state-funded investment is not for exporting more Mercedes-Benz and VW vehicles, but to reinforce loading docks to be able to transport military equipment like a 60-ton Leopard tank to future front lines.

title: Iran War Hits 60-Day Legal Deadline | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/01/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争已到 60 天法律期限 |权力平衡：最新版 05/01/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Eugene Vindman (D-VA), says the administration “owes” Congress an explanation of its Iran strategy as the conflict nears the 60-day mark. Jessica Taylor, Senate and Governors Editor for the Cook Political Report, says the 2026 Senate map is "trending in Democrats' direction," citing the lingering Iran conflict and rising gas prices as political headwinds for Republicans. Jen Gavito, Senior Advisor with the Cohen Group, talks about the US planning to withdraw 5,000 US troops from Germany. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Picks Barr Over Musk-Backed Rival in Kentucky Senate Race
title_cn: 特朗普在肯塔基州参议员竞选中选择巴尔，而不是马斯克支持的竞争对手
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Representative Andy Barr, one of the Republicans running to replace former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell in Kentucky’s primary election later this month.

title: Gavito on Germany Pullback, NATO Tensions
title_cn: 加维托谈德国撤军和北约紧张局势
summary: Jen Gavito, Senior Advisor with the Cohen Group and former Acting Principal Deputy Assistant Secretary of State for Near Eastern Affairs in the Biden administration, says the planned withdrawal of 5,000 US troops from Germany reflects both frustration with NATO allies and potentially personal tensions between President Trump and Berlin over criticism of the administration’s Iran strategy. She also warns it may be harder for the US to absorb the economic fallout from a prolonged shutdown of the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senate Trending Toward Dems in '26: Taylor
title_cn: 泰勒：26 年参议院倾向于民主党
summary: Jessica Taylor, Senate and Governors Editor for the Cook Political Report, says the 2026 Senate map is "trending in Democrats' direction," citing the lingering Iran conflict and rising gas prices as political headwinds for Republicans. She flags candidate risks in key contests, warning Democrats' path in Maine could be complicated by a "risky" nominee with "baggage." In Texas, she says the race could shift depending on whether Republicans nominate John Cornyn or Ken Paxton, with Paxton seen as more vulnerable against Democrat James Talarico, though the seat remains GOP-favored. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Owes Congress Iran Plan: Rep. Vindman
title_cn: 白宫欠国会伊朗计划：众议员温德曼
summary: Representative Eugene Vindman (D-VA), a retired US Army officer and member of the House Armed Services Committee, says the administration “owes” Congress an explanation of its Iran strategy as the conflict nears the 60-day mark, warning the ceasefire is only a temporary pause. He disputes President Trump’s claims on munitions stockpiles and calls the administration’s approach to Ukraine and Russia “all wrong” and “chaos.” Vindman also blasts Republicans over the DHS shutdown, saying the prolonged standoff caused “more chaos, more cruelty, more pain.” He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Seeks to Woo Seniors by Touting Tax Law, Drug Cost Push
title_cn: 特朗普试图通过宣扬税法、推高药品价格来吸引老年人
summary: President Donald Trump argued that his economic agenda had delivered for older Americans and lowered their costs of living as he sought to rally their support before November’s midterm elections.

title: US Orders Withdrawal of About 5,000 Troops From Germany
title_cn: 美国下令从德国撤军约5000人
summary: The US has ordered the drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany, following through on President Donald Trump’s threats to reduce the American military presence in the country. Cohen Group Senior Adviser Jen Gavito discusses the Pentagon's decision on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Bemoans Iran Talks, Magna CEO Talks News Trump Tariffs | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗谈判表示哀叹，麦格纳首席执行官发表讲话彭博商业周刊日报 5/1/2026
summary: On today's episode, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Jayati Bharadwaj, TD Head of FX Strategy on FX and Jeff Mason, Bloomberg News White House Correspondent, about the latest on negotiations, and the latest announcement on tariffs being reimposed on EU carmakers. They also speak with Magna International CEO Swamy Kotagiri, and the CEO of Brooks Running Dan Sheridan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: There’s More Trade Drama Ahead for US Deal With Mexico, Canada
title_cn: 美国与墨西哥和加拿大的贸易协议即将上演更多戏剧性事件
summary: The Pact with US Neighbors Is Under Review Ahead of a July Deadline.

title: Trump Rues State of Iran Talks, Says Prefers Not to Strike
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗国情谈判表示遗憾，表示宁愿不发动袭击
summary: President Donald Trump expressed displeasure with the current state of negotiations with Iran but stopped short of threatening fresh military action in the nine-week conflict that’s triggered a global energy crisis.

title: Trump Says 'Not Happy' on Iran, Touts Hormuz Closure | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示对伊朗“不满意”，并吹捧霍尔木兹海峡关闭权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's stance on Iran as he considers the path forward on Iran and tells lawmakers that he doesn't need congressional approval for military operations in the region. On today's show, Director and senior adviser of the Middle East Program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies Mona Yacoubian, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck and Republican Strategist Rosemary Becchi, and Republican Congressman from Florida Mike Haridopolos. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Plans 25% Tariff on European Autos
title_cn: 特朗普计划对欧洲汽车征收 25% 关税
summary: President Donald Trump says he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming the bloc is not complying with a trade agreement. Tyler Kendall reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Vows 25% Tariff on European Autos in Escalating Trade Rift
title_cn: 贸易裂痕升级 特朗普誓言对欧洲汽车征收25%关税
summary: President Donald Trump said he was raising tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming that the bloc had failed to fully comply with a trade agreement negotiated with the US.
